data.body:
➜ foolery git:(feat/foolery-7f40-add-button-height) ✗ foolery stop
/Users/cartine/.local/bin/foolery: line 110: printf: ->: invalid option
printf: usage: printf [-v var] format [arguments]
[foolery]  New Foolery version available: v0.5.1 (installed v0.5.0)
/Users/cartine/.local/bin/foolery: line 110: printf: ->: invalid option
printf: usage: printf [-v var] format [arguments]
[foolery]  Upgrade: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/acartine/foolery/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
[foolery] ==> Stopping Foolery (pid 1162)
[foolery] [ok] Stopped.
data.title: bash errors in foolery stop
